sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("White bar:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}")
print("Legend squares:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 4 and n['id'] < 5:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
